subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Verily, this is Thy servant who hath turned toward the sacred realms of Thy divinity and hath desired [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذا عبدک الذی التفت الی میادین قدس الوهیتک و اراد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @presence of; reunion with God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
